The trivial chore is still yielding negligible progress, confirming that this approach cannot bridge the gap to the Thursday deadline with my current low energy.

After 0.5 hours, progress only rose to 0.45, confirming this trivial chore remains too slow to meet the Thursday deadline despite my low energy.
The deadline passed at 22:00 with only 50% progress, confirming this trivial chore is too slow to finish on time given my low energy and sleep debt.
